unsupported_implied.text: System shall provide an explicit manual-processing workflow in the admin console to flag mail-in prepaid orders as verified so administrators can generate and issue prepaid PINs for mail-in payments.
unsupported_implied.source_snippet: "you’ll need a way to flag those orders manual-processed to generate PINs."
unsupported_implied.reason: The gold set requires mail-in prepaid purchase and PIN generation/export, but does not explicitly require a system capability to flag or mark mail-in orders as manually verified in the admin UI to trigger PIN generation. The source clearly requests a manual verification/flagging workflow for mail-in payments, which is a distinct operational capability not spelled out in the gold requirements.

unsupported_implied.text: System shall parse and distinguish specific CyberSource gateway error codes (e.g., network vs issuer vs system) to present appropriate user-facing messages, and it shall not auto-queue/process charges server-side during gateway outages without explicit user re-confirmation.
unsupported_implied.source_snippet: "we emit specific codes (e.g., network vs issuer vs system). ... do not queue a charge server-side without a new confirmation."
unsupported_implied.reason: The gold requirements state the site should continue browsing and disable purchases when the gateway is down, but do not require interpreting distinct gateway error codes or explicitly forbid server-side queuing of charges. The source explicitly requests handling specific error codes for tailored messaging and explicitly prohibits server-side queuing of charges without a new confirmation, which is a significant payment-handling behavior not present in the gold set.
